resources.name: 木板
resources.description: 用于夜晚应急封堵，也用于白天加固门窗。
resources.description_en: Used for emergency night repairs and daytime fortification.

resources.name: 零件
resources.description: 用于修理发电机、天线、电台和结构加固。
resources.description_en: Used to fix generator, antenna, radio, and structural upgrades.

resources.name: 电池
resources.description: 用于维持电力、广播和部分低光照方案。
resources.description_en: Used to maintain power, broadcasts, and low-light setups.

resources.name: 药品
resources.description: 用于医务角、搜救伤员和稳定避难者。
resources.description_en: Used for the medbay, rescue operations, and morale.

resources.name: 暴露度
resources.description: 广播、灯光、搜救和人口增长会提高暴露度；暴露度越高，夜晚越容易被追踪。
resources.description_en: Higher exposure means easier to track at night.

resources.name: 信任
resources.description: 避难者对值班台和同伴的信任。影响恐慌、冲突和部分白天选择。
resources.description_en: Refugee trust in the watch post and allies.
